Question 1. Faith

  1. Is the object of faith the First Truth?

Article 1. Whether the object of faith is the First Truth?

Objection 1. It would seem that faith is not ordered only to the First Truth.

Objection 2. Further, charity is mentioned above in I-II:62:3.

On the contrary, Dionysius says that faith is about the simple and everlasting truth.

I answer that, Faith assents to what is revealed by God.

Reply to Objection 1. Creatures come under faith in relation to God.

Reply to Objection 2. Further discussion appears at II-II:25:1.
